title: peucedanum autumnale
intro: Peucedanum autumnale, also known as Autumn Fern or Turnip-rooted Carrot, is a perennial plant species in the carrot family, native to Europe and Asia. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and expectorant properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Peucedanum autumnale can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
